title: S&P 500 Hits New All-Time High: Tech Stocks Drive 18% YTD Gains
shortdescription: Magnificent 7 leads rally as Fed cut expectations reach 95% probability.
description: Dow +2%, Nasdaq +3% on strong retail earnings – VIX drops to 12.5, lowest since 2023.
author: Henrry Willy

title: Ilhan Omar Attacked with Unknown Substance at Minnesota Town Hall, Suspect Arrested
shortdescription: Ilhan Omar was sprayed with an unidentified substance during a Minneapolis town hall. Police arrested a suspect as concerns over political violence grow.
description: City forensic scientists were dispatched to investigate the situation. Kazmierczak has a history of posting political content on social media.
author: Macro Anton

title: Global Stock Markets Fall Sharply as Iran Conflict and Rising Oil Prices Shake Investor Confidence
shortdescription: Global stock markets fell as Iran conflict fears and rising oil prices fueled concerns over inflation, interest rates, and economic uncertainty worldwide.
description: Global stock markets turned lower as fears surrounding the Iran conflict resurfaced and investors reacted to rising oil prices and growing geopolitical uncertainty.
author: Gwen John

title: ISRO Investigates PSLV-C62 Anomaly After EOS-N1 Satellite Loss
shortdescription: ISRO hit a snag in its PSLV-C62 mission late in flight, resulting in the loss of the EOS-N1 satellite.
description: The mission sent up 16 payloads including the strategic EOS-N1 satellite, all of which were lost after a third-stage anomaly.
author: Gwen John

title: Strait of Hormuz Tensions Escalate Despite Trump Ceasefire Claims
shortdescription: Fresh clashes between the US and Iran near the Strait of Hormuz have reignited fears over the fragile ceasefire, pushing oil prices higher and rattling global markets.
description: Tensions between the United States and Iran escalated again despite President Donald Trump insisting that the ceasefire remains “in effect.” Fresh exchanges of fire in and around the Strait of Hormuz raised fears that the fragile truce could collapse.
author: Macro Anton

title: Hawaii Faces Economic Crisis: Rising Costs, Low Wages, and Declining Population
shortdescription: Hawaii's population has steadily declined due to rising costs and stagnant wages.
description: New research highlights the state's growing economic challenges and the exodus of working families.
author: Macro Anton

title: Wise (TransferWise) Reports $10 Billion Profit – Bigger Than JPMorgan
shortdescription: UK fintech disrupts global remittances — now most profitable bank on earth.
description: Zero-fee international transfers + 5% interest accounts = Wise passes 25 million customers and $10B annual profit.
author: Gwen John

title: Oil Prices Tumble 5% as Global Oversupply Concerns Eclipse Geopolitical Tensions
shortdescription: Brent crude retreats to $70 as US inventories swell and recession fears resurface.
description: Crude oil benchmarks witnessed a sharp reversal on Monday, with WTI dropping to $62.25 despite ongoing Middle East volatility and OPEC+ uncertainty.
author: Henrry Willy
